final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic explaining the definitions and relationships between AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, distillation, and CLI.

Style/medium: hand-drawn infographic style, sketch-like illustrations with clean typography, educational diagram aesthetic, whiteboard marker look with light watercolor washes
Subject: central diagram showing 7 tech concepts (AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, distillation, CLI) with connecting arrows and relationship labels, icons for each concept
Composition: vertical flowchart layout, top-down hierarchy with AI at the top, clear visual grouping, generous whitespace between sections
Color palette: warm accent colors for different concept groups (blues for AI/Agent, greens for MCP/OpenClaw, oranges for Skill/distillation), black ink lines on off-white background
Text (verbatim): "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must be readable at small sizes; simplified icons must convey meaning without text; relationship arrows must be unambiguous
Avoid: photorealistic rendering; complex 3D elements; cluttered overlapping text; gradients that reduce clarity; generic stock illustration style
